chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 27 of 2001 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on O/A’s Reference No. 01/2022. 2. For orders on O/A’s Reference No. 02/2024. 20.02.2026. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Mushtaq Ahmed Legahri, Official Assignee.......... None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation has been received. As per perusal of previous orders, it appears that no one seems to be pursuing this matter, which reflects that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the same, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ayaz
